As a module user
I want a shared dock with quick actions and keyboard shortcuts
So that I can reach assistant actions from anywhere in a module

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] The root layout mounts a shared Oliver dock inside the provider tree.
- [ ] The dock can open through UI state and keyboard shortcuts.

Notes: The dock is wired globally; I did not verify behavior across all viewport states.
